languages.text: Транспортные плиты парят, попирая гравитацию мощью ксенотехнологий. И пусть человеку не дано постичь принципы их работы — эти ксеномеханизмы способны вызволить Вольного Торговца из западни.

traits.locale_text: Транспортные плиты парят, попирая гравитацию мощью ксенотехнологий. И пусть человеку не дано постичь принципы их работы — эти ксеномеханизмы способны вызволить Вольного Торговца из западни.

languages.text: Floating transport slabs defy gravity through advanced xenotech. Though it is not for Humanity to fathom their principles, these very mechanisms may yet deliver the Rogue Trader from the trap.
languages.original_text: Транспортные плиты парят, попирая гравитацию мощью ксенотехнологий. И пусть человеку не дано постичь принципы их работы — эти ксеномеханизмы способны вызволить Вольного Торговца из западни.

Floating transport slabs defy gravity through advanced xenotech. Though it is not for Humanity to fathom their principles, these very mechanisms may yet deliver the Rogue Trader from the trap.

languages.text: Schwebende Transportplattformen trotzen der Schmerkraft mittels Xenotech. Obwohl kein Mensch ihre Prinzipien erfassen kann, könnten genau diese Mechanismen {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} aus der Falle befreien.
languages.original_text: Floating transport slabs defy gravity through advanced xenotech. Though it is not for Humanity to fathom their principles, these very mechanisms may yet deliver the Rogue Trader from the trap.

traits.locale_text: Schwebende Transportplattformen trotzen der Schmerkraft mittels Xenotech. Obwohl kein Mensch ihre Prinzipien erfassen kann, könnten genau diese Mechanismen {mf|den Freihändler|die Freihändlerin} aus der Falle befreien.

languages.text: Des dalles de transport flottantes défient la gravité grâce à des xénotechnologies avancées. Si ces mécanismes sont incompréhensibles pour un esprit humain, ils pourraient toutefois être la clé qui délivrera {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} du piège.
languages.original_text: Floating transport slabs defy gravity through advanced xenotech. Though it is not for Humanity to fathom their principles, these very mechanisms may yet deliver the Rogue Trader from the trap.

traits.locale_text: Des dalles de transport flottantes défient la gravité grâce à des xénotechnologies avancées. Si ces mécanismes sont incompréhensibles pour un esprit humain, ils pourraient toutefois être la clé qui délivrera {mf|le libre-marchand|la libre-marchande} du piège.

languages.text: 这些悬浮的运输平台依靠先进的异形科技对抗着重力。虽然人类无法理解其原理，但这些装置或许能帮助行商浪人逃离陷阱。
languages.original_text: Floating transport slabs defy gravity through advanced xenotech. Though it is not for Humanity to fathom their principles, these very mechanisms may yet deliver the Rogue Trader from the trap.

traits.locale_text: 这些悬浮的运输平台依靠先进的异形科技对抗着重力。虽然人类无法理解其原理，但这些装置或许能帮助行商浪人逃离陷阱。

languages.text: Una serie de losas de transporte desafían a la gravedad mediante xenotecnología avanzada. Aunque no le corresponde a la Humanidad entender sus principios, esta maquinaria podría ayudar a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente a escapar de la trampa.
languages.original_text: Floating transport slabs defy gravity through advanced xenotech. Though it is not for Humanity to fathom their principles, these very mechanisms may yet deliver the Rogue Trader from the trap.

traits.locale_text: Una serie de losas de transporte desafían a la gravedad mediante xenotecnología avanzada. Aunque no le corresponde a la Humanidad entender sus principios, esta maquinaria podría ayudar a{mf|l| la} Comerciante Independiente a escapar de la trampa.

languages.text: 輸送プレートはゼノテクノロジーの力で重力に逆らい、舞い上がる。人間がその制御を理解できなくても、このゼノメカニズムだけがフリー・トレーダーを罠から救い出すことができる。
languages.original_text: Transport plates soar, defying gravity with the power of xenotechnology. Even though man cannot comprehend their control, only these xenomechanisms can bring the Free Trader out of the trap.

languages.text: Yüzen nakliye tabakaları, gelişmiş zeno teknolojisi sayesinde yer çekimine meydan okuyor. Her ne kadar prensiplerini kavramak İnsanlığa düşmese de bu mekanizmalar, Hür Tacir'i tuzaktan kurtarabilir.
languages.original_text: Floating transport slabs defy gravity through advanced xenotech. Though it is not for Humanity to fathom their principles, these very mechanisms may yet deliver the Rogue Trader from the trap.

traits.locale_text: Yüzen nakliye tabakaları, gelişmiş zeno teknolojisi sayesinde yer çekimine meydan okuyor. Her ne kadar prensiplerini kavramak İnsanlığa düşmese de bu mekanizmalar, Hür Tacir'i tuzaktan kurtarabilir.
